=== setlist.txt
===================
===================
===================
September 12, 1999, The Cajundome, University Of Southwestern Louisiana, Lafayette, Louisiana

I Am The Man, Thomas - Mr. Tambourine Man - It's Alright, Ma (I'm Only Bleeding) - To Ramona - Tangled Up In Blue - All Along The Watchtower - Positively 4th Street - Silvio - Not Dark Yet - Highway 61 Revisited - Like A Rolling Stone - It Ain't Me, Babe - The Boxer (duet with Paul Simon) - That'll Be The Day/The Wanderer (Medley with Paul Simon) - Knockin' On Heaven's Door (Duet with Paul Simon)
